headline: Dell Stock Leads the S&P 500 Today. Next Week’s Earnings Could Send It Higher.
summary: Dell Technologies stock rises, leading the S&P 500. Analysts believe Dell will beat fiscal first-quarter earnings next week, but a strong performance from its AI business is needed.

headline: Wells Fargo & Company (WFC) Launches Advisor Gateway, Here’s What You Need to Know
summary: Wells Fargo & Company (NYSE:WFC) is one of the Most Undervalued US Stocks According to Hedge Funds. headline: Dow rises to record intraday high on Iran peace hopes
summary: Investors have faith that a US-Iran peace deal could be within reach even as oil prices climb
